steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Money')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Money')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'User ID')] and th[contains(text(), 'Money')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")
